titleStmt.title: SII 37.246: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 246. (A.R. No. B 352 of 1940-41.) Nemaḷḷadinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Vishnu temple.
This is dated Śaka 1439, Īśvara, Pushya śu. 2, Monday, corresponding to 1517 A.D., December 14.

It records the confirmation of a former grant of the Sthlasuṅkha by the Vidvanamahājanas of the village Namilidinne and by Kṛishṇayyaṅgāru, son of Pōlepalli Tipparaju made previously by Rāmarāya for the dasamī-mahōtsavas of the Perumāḷ. The village Namilidinne is stated to be situated in Pālūri-sīma and given as nāyaṅkara to Bukkarāju-Ammarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1439 Agunēṁṭi
yīśvara saṁvvatsara puṣya śu 2 sō śrīmadrājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrīkriṣṇadēvarā
ya mahārāyalu pṛdhivirājyaṁ śēyucuṁ
nnuṁḍḍi bukkarāju Aṁmmarājuṁ gāri nāyaṁkkarā
nakuṁ bāliṁccina pālūri śīmalō namilidi
ṁna stitāśēṣa vidvaṁnmahā janāluṁnnu pōlēpalli tipparā
juṁgāri komāruṁḍu kriṣṇayyaṁgāruṁnu kritāna rā
maya rāyaṁḍu perumāḷlaku sama¨rpiṁccina staḷa suṁ
ṁkhaṁ pū¨rvamariyādanē nēmuṁnnu tiṁmmarājuṁ
gāriki puṇyaṁgānu perumāḷa daśami mahōtsa
vānaku Istimi . yī staḷasuṁkhaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastā
Igānu perumāḷlu Avadhariccuvāru
yī staḷa suṁkhānaku yavvaru tappinā
nu tamatallidaṁḍṟlanu vāraṇāśilō va
dhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . gaṁgga
ka¨rtanu gōbrāhmaṇa vadha cēśina pāpā
naṁ bōvuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . svadattaṁ vvā paradattaṁ vvā yō
harēti vasuṁdhara . ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāytē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 37.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
